title: High-Quality Kenai River Fly Fishing with True Alaskans
summary: If you’re looking for the best Kenai River fly fishing experience , you’ve come to the right place. At Kenai Fly Fish , we are born and raised Alaskans , deeply connected to the land, the rivers, and the incredible fishing opportunities that make this state legendary. Our team has spent a lifetime mastering these waters, ensuring that every guest gets a truly authentic, high-quality guided Alaska fly fishing trip . Whether you’re after trophy Rainbow Trout, powerful King Salmon, or hard-fighting Sockeye , we’ll take you to the best spots and show you exactly how to land your dream fish. Our passion, expertise, and commitment to excellence make...

title: Arctic Sea Ice Extent: March 20, 2025
summary: March 20, 2025: The Arctic sea ice has experienced a relatively small increase for this week at a rate of 0.98% (as opposed to last week’s increase rate of 0.79%), from the level on 03/13/2025 of 14.192 M km 2 to 14.333 M km 2 for this week.
